name: user-testing-agents
description: 9 behavioral persona agents that test your product's usability in parallel. Each persona traces actual code paths from a distinct cognitive archetype — Scanner, Deliberator, Rushing Pragmatist, Novice, Power User, Distracted Multitasker, Accessibility User, Skeptical Evaluator, UI Purist — and produces scored findings using a 5-dimension composite usability model.
